case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. LA SAGNA, ELSPETH K.

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, CALENDAR OF DEC-15-1994 GRANTED EXCEPT FOR THE SUM OF $50.00 TO BE WITHHELD FROM EACH PAY PERIOD. LEVYING OFFICER DIRECTED TO RELEASE 1/2 OF EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR AND THE OTHER TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT.
